{{Chess Opening Theory/Position|name=Queen's Gambit Declined - Exchange Variation}}

== Queen's Gambit Declined - Exchange Variation ==

=== 4. cxd5 ===
With 4. cxd5, White enters into the Exchange Variation of the Queen's Gambit Declined. White aims to enter a Carlsbad pawn structure position, and has a variety of plans, including the queenside "minority attack", or a big pawn center duo with an eventual ...f3 and ...e4. 

Black usually responds with [[Chess Opening Theory/1. d4/1...d5/2. c4/2...e6/3. Nc3/3...Nf6/4. cxd5/4...exd5|4...exd5]], which frees up the c8-bishop, and officially enters the thematical Carlsbad pawn structure, though he can alternatively recapture with 4...Nxd5, which usually transposes into the Semi-Tarrasch.
